economic_notes: Owns 100% of Sambaa K'e Development Corporation (financial statements not yet completed, causing qualified audit opinion). Also holds 14.27% interest in Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence about Sambaa K'e Development Corporation (100% owned subsidiary whose financial statements were not yet completed). Province code set to NT (Northwest Territories). The nation is recognized by GNWT MACA as designated authority for municipal services to community of Sambaa K'e. Earnings from subsidiaries of $88,460 included in annual surplus. Contributions repayable of $13,110 unchanged from prior year. Deferred contributions total $11,640,147. Total revenue of $4,960,376 includes deferred revenue movements; osr calculated as other revenue + interest income ($501,355 + $406,620 = $907,975 less contributions in other lines). total_government_transfers calculated as MACA + ISC + Dehcho + GNWT + others contributions = 1,939,222 + 990,815 + 234,744 + 1,121,705 + 23,798 = 4,310,284; osr = 4,960,376 - 4,310,284 = 650,092.
